Package de.uka.ilkd.key.pp

Class ModalityPositionTable

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.PositionTable
de.uka.ilkd.key.pp.ModalityPositionTable
public class ModalityPositionTable extends PositionTable
This is a position table for program modality formulae. In addition to the usual tables, it can store a range of character positions for the first statement in the Java block.

  • Field Summary

  • Method Details

    • setFirstStatementRange

      public void setFirstStatementRange(Range r)

    • getFirstStatementRange

      public Range getFirstStatementRange()
      Overrides:
      getFirstStatementRange in class PositionTable
      Returns:
      Returns the character range of the first java statement in a program modality for thisposition table. If this is not a program modality, returns null. Note that this will be overridden in the subclass ModalityPositionTable.
